cells.rationale: New claim primitive and spool-validated synthetic-event surface touching reducer UPSERT columns, fold determinism, and a liveness-gated exclusion lock whose failure silently wedges recover — a contract-shaped, subtle-correctness opus gate at xhigh for new-pattern contract work.

Inverting provision fan-in timing with a half-assembled-base invariant (a lane must not present as assembled to finalize) plus byte-equivalence on the no-incident path is a subtle correctness invariant across daemon and skill, warranting opus at xhigh.

Explicitly the highest-interlock seam: a fencing-token trunk lease, re-probed tri-state ancestry gate, dead-holder release, and every legacy finalize discriminant that must map identically — a security/correctness-critical opus gate deserving the max ceiling.

A level-triggered router whose bypass predicate is a sharp correctness edge (too broad loops dispatch, too narrow starves incidents) cutting across reconcile-core, suppression, recover demotion, and base-freshness defer — cross-cutting invariant work for opus at xhigh.
